title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3 as a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for physical AI. Vera serves as a CPU layer for AI agents. Isaac GR00T is a reference humanoid robot platform completing NVIDIA's physical AI stack.
